Happy Birthday!

23 & more magical than ever 🌹

Kuttuu,

Miles apart — yet you live in every thought, every smile,
every quiet moment of my day.

Today the world gets to celebrate the girl who makes
my world whole. You are my favourite person,
my peace, my home — even from a distance.

Thank you for being you. Thank you for being mine.
I love you more than any distance can ever measure. 💕

— Always yours, Lutal 🌙
